# CWE-79 positive: reflected XSS via text/template (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-79-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"text/template"
)

// CWE-79 Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
// Vulnerable line: user input rendered into HTML template without escaping
// (text/template doesn't auto-escape unlike html/template).
func ShowWelcome(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet {
		http.Error(w, "method", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	visitor := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	if visitor == "" {
		visitor = "guest"
	}
	tmpl := template.Must(template.New("page").Parse("<html><body><p>Welcome, {{.}}!</p></body></html>"))
	tmpl.Execute(w, visitor)
}
